  Details:
  PR1 (code half) of the Edgar to dao_protocol extraction. Added an optional [server] extra and the truesight_dao_client/server/ subpackage: FastAPI app factory (main.py), DAO_PROTOCOL_ settings (config.py), health routes /ping and /healthz, a console script, and deploy tooling (deploy.sh + systemd unit targeting seni_ror_new:8010, modeled on Edgar deploy.sh). CLI install stays lean; server deps only via the extra. Validated locally with a fresh venv + FastAPI TestClient: both health routes return 200 and OpenAPI builds. Updated the execution resume tracker and backlog (agentic_ai_context PR 189), splitting PR1 into the merged code scaffold and a still-pending live deploy + nginx flip that needs operator go-ahead.
